programme.title: She's Missing

programme.title: California Paranormal
programme.desc: SHORT - (Cable / Digital) California is a weird place, but just how weird can best be told by residents with bone chilling true stories of Paranormal and Supernatural encounters that defy description - from Alien visitations to Poltergeist manifestations that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: The Dark Mirror of Magick
programme.desc: "This is the most remarkable record of a supernatural event I have ever witnessed." - Wayne Darwen, Director. On January 3rd, 2001, documentary writer/producer Wayne Darwen brought a professional TV news crew into the Temple of the O.T.A. to visually record a remarkable event: the summoning of the ancient spirit Vassago. On February 1st, the Los Angeles affiliate of a National TV Network broadcast an edited version of Vassago's Prophecy, confirming that the Spirit had predicted a major news event. Only 13 days after the ritual was visually recorded, President Laurent Kabila of the Congo was assassinated! In this video version we show you the entire operation in sequence, exactly as it happened with no rehearsals and no retakes. Wayne Darwen also interviews the Magister Thabion (Poke Runyon) and the mystic seer Frater Solomon. Their unrehearsed answers to his probing questions leave no doubt as to the philosophical depth and spiritual power of Solomon's ancient Magick even in this modern age. In "The Magick of Solomon" video we dramatically reenacted magical rituals for instructive purposes, whereas "Dark Mirror of Magick" is the record of an actual magical operation of historical significance. We believe that this remarkable documentary will be studied and commented on for years to come.This 2011 edition has ten more minutes of new footage added with commentary on the Vassago Prophecy, as subsequently revealed in the following two years, plus a new prophecy from Vassago himself. Viewer discretion is advised, do not engage in these practices without the supervision of an experienced adept.CAUTION; This DVD shows actual Spirit Summoning, not recommended for immature viewers.

programme.title: Nacho Mountain
programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: 60 Seconds to Die
programme.desc: SHORT (DIGITAL) - A non-stop, heart pounding, horror anthology uniting amazing new filmmakers from across the globe to create a new dimension in Terror. Modern day Grindhouse, in the style of the most shocking and gritty movies of the 70's will grind you up and spit you out.

programme.title: Order of One: Kung Fu Killing Spree
programme.desc: Sonny, an escaped convict, and his unwilling cohort Ross Conroy, stand in the way of the city’s crime lord - Mr. Park, and his desire to possess the ultimate talisman: The Sword of Destiny. Forged from the spear that pierced the side of Jesus on the Cross, the sword gives unspeakable power to whomever touches it. But, in trying to achieve his nefarious goal to use the sword’s power to control everything in his path, Park underestimates the tenacity of Sonny and Ross. Soon the heroic duo are challenged by all of Park’s forces, including his nephew Tommy, the killer trio known as the Three Blind Mice and the beautiful but ruthless and deadly combination of the Sirens, Dynamite and Butterfly. Sonny and Ross have one mission before their luck runs out: to get the sword to The Order for safekeeping. The fate of The Sword, and all who come in contact with it, is in their hands.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 10 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. In this episode, the crew wraps up the regular season and debates whether Duke will make the NCAA Tournament. Mitch and Hogan mourn Ohio State's season-ending loss to Michigan, current UAlbany and future Philly Waterdogs attackman Silas Richmond joins the show, and PLL Beat Writer Zach Carey checks in with the latest buzz from training camp.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 214: Signature #4 Shake-Up, Hodet Breakthrough, and Who Are You Choosing? Signature #4 delivered a shake-up, and Around the ACL is breaking down everything that went down. Meesh, Jake, and Anthony start with Doubles, where Justin Burton Jr. and Cash Chamness come out on top with a statement win. In Singles, it was Colin Hodet getting it done, adding another big-time performance to his season and putting himself firmly in the spotlight. We also hit the rest of the divisions, including Payton Haynes in Women’s Singles, Sam Finley / Gina Ramirez in Women’s Doubles, and more dominance from Matt Guy in the Seniors division. Plus, a strong showing from Jack McKinney across Juniors. To close it out, we switch it up with a fun segment: “Who Are You Choosing?” From clutch moments to chaos factor, we’re picking the pros we trust (and don’t) in high-pressure situations—game on the line, one bag to win, and everything in between. Big wins, shifting momentum, and a different kind of debate to end the show—this one’s a good mix of insight and fun.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: A Future Stolen: Finding Justice for Sade Robinson
programme.desc: In Milwaukee, 19-year-old Sade Robinson has gone missing, and her car is found torched. A trail of evidence across the city shocks the community and leaves her family searching for justice.

programme.title: Plate It! Baltimore: Fry Fest Challenge
programme.desc: Everything's better fried, right? Chefs Melanie Kerr and Colin Liang put that hypothesis to the test in this Fry Fest challenge. Will their ideas come out crisped to perfection, or sad and soggy?

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?: All Around The Wait, What Happened World
programme.desc: In this season's finale, Frank Nicotero finds a couple of good sports in New Orleans and Cincinnati. Watch as he revisits the most absurd moments from the first two seasons.

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Don’t Cave Into The Pressure
programme.desc: Ivan Gomez is on a weight loss journey, but it’s one that’s been limited to exercising in his home. Kinga meets Ivan in Stockton, CA to show him how the outdoors can be a personal gym for body, mind and spirit.

programme.title: Local Love: Hopeless Romantic Searches for Fellow Swiftie
programme.desc: Peter’s first love may be Taylor Swift, but he’s ready to let another person in. Who will sweep this Switfy off of his feet and into his very own fairytale?
